creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Hi. At the time I tried Wayland according to FreeBSD Handbook's 6th Chapter, I couldn't launch Alacritty terminal due to missing fonts, installing any font seems to fix it. At least, this command below should return any font.

% fc-match monospace
NotoSansMono-Regular.ttf: "Noto Sans Mono" "Regular"

If I remember correctly, I was not getting any matched font with this command before I install some font.

I think it would be better to suggest installing some font for alacritty terminal.
